subtitles.original: 世界を敵に回したとしても
subtitles.english: Even if I make the world my enemy,

subtitles.original: 信じて 差し出す 手のひら
subtitles.english: trust me, and hold out your hand.

subtitles.original: 決して離さない 想いは届いた
subtitles.english: I will never let go, my feelings have reached you.

subtitles.original: 結んだ運命 この手の中
subtitles.english: This bound destiny is in our hands.

subtitles.original: 繰り返された 答えだとしても
subtitles.english: Even if it's an answer that repeats itself...

subtitles.original: 決して
subtitles.english: Never...

subtitles.original: 逃げない 怖くは無いから
subtitles.english: will I run away, because there's nothing to fear.

subtitles.original: 抗うんだ
subtitles.english: I will fight back.

subtitles.original: 何度も 何度も 走り続けるよ
subtitles.english: Over and over again, I'll keep running on!

subtitles.original: Wake up! 闘志オンにして
subtitles.english: Wake up! Turn on your fighting spirit!

subtitles.original: Shift up! ギア回して
subtitles.english: Shift up! Shift the gears!

subtitles.original: Speed up! 羽ばたいて
subtitles.english: Speed up! Spread your wings!

subtitles.original: U.M.A. NEW WORLD!
subtitles.english: U.M.A. NEW WORLD!

subtitles.original: Jump up! てっぺんへ
subtitles.english: Jump up! To the very top!

subtitles.original: Turn up! 声合わせて
subtitles.english: Turn up! Join our voices!

subtitles.original: Dream on! 未来繋いで
subtitles.english: Dream on! Connect our futures!

subtitles.original: U.M.A. NEW WORLD!
subtitles.english: U.M.A. NEW WORLD!

subtitles.original: 最高潮コンディション 闘志ガンガン尖ってこう
subtitles.english: Peak condition! Let's sharpen our fighting spirit!

subtitles.original: 栄光のチャンピオン 虎視眈々と狙ってこう
subtitles.english: Glory's champion! Let's watch vigilantly for our chance!

subtitles.original: ハイペースにマイペース
subtitles.english: High pace, my pace,

subtitles.original: 気合いレースに超集中
subtitles.english: super focused on this energetic race!

subtitles.original: 駆ける背中は限界突破 ハートに火をつけて
subtitles.english: Running past limits, setting our hearts on fire!

subtitles.original: U.M.A. Let's go!
subtitles.english: U.M.A. Let's go!

subtitles.original: 最高潮アディクション 互い掲げた勝負
subtitles.english: Climax addiction! The challenge we laid down together,

subtitles.original: 千載一遇のチャンスを 全力出して掴んでこう
subtitles.english: let's give it our all and seize this once-in-a-lifetime chance!

subtitles.original: ハイペースにマイペース
subtitles.english: High pace, my pace,

subtitles.original: 気合いレースに猛集中
subtitles.english: intensely focused on this energetic race!

subtitles.original: 駆けるフォームをセットして 熱くちぎってこう
subtitles.english: Set your running form and tear through passionately!

subtitles.original: 友と二人 競い合った 風の中でも
subtitles.english: Competing together with a friend, even through the wind,

subtitles.original: 大きな背中 追いかけてた 雨の中でも
subtitles.english: chasing that great back, even in the rain,

subtitles.original: 何百何千回と 積み重ねてきた
subtitles.english: hundreds, thousands of times, we have built this up.

subtitles.original: だからどこまでも遠く どこまでも高く
subtitles.english: So, no matter how far, no matter how high,

subtitles.original: 誰よりも早く 誰よりも強く
subtitles.english: faster than anyone, stronger than anyone!

subtitles.original: さあ、今！
subtitles.english: Now, let's go!

subtitles.original: 駆け出した想いは もう止まらない
subtitles.english: The feelings we started running with won't stop!

subtitles.original: 誰にも渡せない ゴールまで
subtitles.english: We won't let anyone else have it, until the goal!

subtitles.original: 弱気な気持ち 蹴飛ばして
subtitles.english: Kick away any timid feelings,

subtitles.original: 一歩だってずっと 立ち上がって走り抜け
subtitles.english: always standing up for every single step, run through!

subtitles.original: 鳴り出した鼓動は 収まらない
subtitles.english: The beating heart that started thumping won't settle down,

subtitles.original: 最後まで 全身 全霊をかけて
subtitles.english: to the very end, putting our whole body and soul into it!

subtitles.original: 頂点へ手を伸ばして 限界さえ超えてゆく
subtitles.english: Reach out for the top, surpassing even our limits!

subtitles.original: 伝説を追い越して 勝利へと
subtitles.english: Overtake legends on the path to victory!

subtitles.original: 友と二人 競い合った あの喜びも
subtitles.english: Competing together with a friend, even that joy,

subtitles.original: 大きな背中 追いかけてた あの憧れも
subtitles.english: chasing that great back, even that aspiration,

subtitles.original: 何千万回と 生まれ変わっても
subtitles.english: even if we are reborn tens of millions of times,

subtitles.original: 何度も
subtitles.english: over and over...

subtitles.original: 何度も
subtitles.english: over again...

subtitles.original: 走り続けるよ
subtitles.english: we will keep running on!

subtitles.original: 駆け出した想いは もう止まらない
subtitles.english: The feelings we started running with won't stop!

subtitles.original: 誰もが夢に見てる 未来まで
subtitles.english: To the future that everyone dreams of!

subtitles.original: 弱気も傷も 迷いも 涙だってずっと
subtitles.english: Fears, wounds, hesitation, and even tears, always...

subtitles.original: 全てを繋いでゆけ
subtitles.english: Connect everything together and carry on!

subtitles.original: さあ、今！
subtitles.english: Now, let's go!

subtitles.english: Reach out for the top, surpassing even our limits!

subtitles.english: Overtake legends on the path to victory!

subtitles.original: 走り続けるよ
subtitles.english: we will keep running on!

subtitles.original: 呼び覚ませ 本能を
subtitles.english: Awaken your instincts!

subtitles.original: 起こせ 波動を
subtitles.english: Unleash the shockwave!

subtitles.original: 見つめて 戦場
subtitles.english: Stare down the battlefield!

subtitles.original: 叫べ Breakout
subtitles.english: Shout out, breakout!

subtitles.original: Woah woah woah
subtitles.english: Woah woah woah

subtitles.original: Break, break, break out

subtitles.original: 阻んでく足音 悔しいのかな
subtitles.english: Are you frustrated by the footsteps blocking your way?

subtitles.original: 錆び付いていた鎧を前に 狼狽えているのか
subtitles.english: Are you losing your composure before this rusted armor?

subtitles.original: 荒れ果てた地 切り拓き 導くんだ
subtitles.english: Forge a path through the desolate lands and lead the way!

subtitles.original: 目を逸らさず 歴史を塗り替えてやるさ
subtitles.english: Without looking away, we'll rewrite history!

subtitles.original: Dan, dan, dan, dan, dan, dan, 上がってく
subtitles.english: Step by step, going higher and higher!

subtitles.original: 歓声 巻き起こして とどめ
subtitles.english: Stir up the cheers and deliver the final blow!

subtitles.original: Dan, dan, dan, dan, dan, dan, 迫ってく
subtitles.english: Step by step, drawing closer and closer!

subtitles.original: あと少し 攻め合う シンパシー

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Thought Process**

Alright, let's get down to it. I've got a video segment here, and my goal is to produce synchronized subtitles, perfectly aligned with the audio and visual events. I have the video, timestamps, some visual markers, vocal and music events, and a `<scene_and_lyrics_reference_json>` with lyrics. It's time to create accurate subtitle text with a solid translation for this user.

First, I need to break down the job. We have three songs: "Ai no Scenario", "U.M.A. NEW WORLD!! (Game Size)", and "Legend-Changer (Game Size)". The rules are clear: the audio is the ground truth. Any burnt-in text on the screen is secondary, so if the text is silent, I'll transcribe the subtitle, but if the audio exists, I'll follow it. No pre-emptive lyric pasting, and no ghost subtitles during instrumentals. Let's make sure that the subtitles are precisely timed.

*   **"Ai no Scenario" (00:00 - 01:14):**
    *   00:00 to 00:10: Instrumental. Nothing to subtitle.
    *   00:10.500 to 00:15.500: "世界を敵に回したとしても" (Even if I make the world my enemy). Check.
    *   00:15.800 to 00:21.000: "信じて 差し出す 手のひら" (Trust me and hold out your hand.). Got it.
    *   00:21.200 to 00:26.500: "決して離さない 想いは届いた" (I will never let go, my feelings have reached you.) then "結んだ運命 この手の中" (This bound destiny is in our hands.). Yes.
    *   00:32.200 to 00:37.000: "繰り返された 答えだとしても" (Even if it's an answer that repeats itself...). Nailed it.
    *   00:42.500 to 00:44.200: "決して" (Never). Good to go.
    *   00:44.200 to 00:49.000: "逃げない 怖くは無いから" (I will never run away, because there's nothing to be afraid of.). Perfect.
    *   00:51.500 to 00:53.800: "抗うんだ" (I'll fight back). Check.
    *   00:54.000 to 01:14.000: Instrumental.

*   **"U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!" (01:19 - 03:59):**
    *   01:18.500 to 01:23.500: "何度も 何度も 走り続けるよ" (Over and over again, I'll keep running on!).
    *   01:24.800 to 01:26.300: "Wake up! 闘志オンにして" (Wake up! Turn on your fighting spirit!).
    *   01:26.300 to 01:27.800: "Shift up! ギア回して" (Shift up! Shift the gears!).
    *   01:27.800 to 01:29.300: "Speed up! 羽ばたいて" (Speed up! Spread your wings!).
    *   01:29.300 to 01:31.000: "U.M.A. NEW WORLD!".

    *   01:32.500 to 01:33.800: "Turn up! 声合わせて" (Turn up! Join our voices!).
    *   01:33.900 to 01:35.300: "Dream on! 未来繋いで" (Dream on! Connect our futures!).
